code.name: OpenShieldHIT
code.notes: Primary-particle-only simulation; secondary particle generation not yet implemented. Uses Gaussian rather than Vavilov straggling. Statistics are intentionally low (1e6) for development purposes.

target_LET_spectrum_silicon.notes: Derived via post-processing (tools/render_diff_results.py); OpenShieldHIT does not natively support differential LET scoring.

target_LET_spectrum_water.notes: Derived via post-processing (tools/render_diff_results.py); OpenShieldHIT does not natively support differential LET scoring.

outputs.description: Differential LET fluence spectrum in silicon target detector. 4 pages: DLET-weighted and TLET-weighted spectra for all particles and primary protons.
outputs.notes: Generated by tools/render_diff_results.py from NB_target.dat. Not a native code output.

outputs.description: Differential LET fluence spectrum in water target detector. 2 pages: DLET-weighted spectra for all particles and primary protons.
outputs.notes: Generated by tools/render_diff_results.py from NB_target_water.dat. Not a native code output.

outputs.description: Depth LET profiles along the Z axis, narrow scorer, in silicon. 6 pages: DLET and TLET for total, primary, and secondary particle contributions.
Depth LET profiles along the Z axis, narrow scorer, in water. 6 pages: DLET and TLET for total, primary, and secondary particle contributions.
Depth dose profiles along the Z axis, narrow scorer, in silicon. 5 pages covering total and per-particle-type contributions.
Depth dose profiles along the Z axis, narrow scorer, in water. 3 pages covering total and per-particle-type contributions.
Depth Q_eff profiles along the Z axis, narrow scorer. 6 pages: DQEFF and TQEFF for total, primary, and secondary particle contributions.
Raw OpenShieldHIT ASCII output for silicon target scorer (converted from .bdo by pymchelper).
Raw OpenShieldHIT ASCII output for water target scorer (converted from .bdo by pymchelper).
Raw OpenShieldHIT ASCII output for transverse XY fluence map.
Raw OpenShieldHIT ASCII output for longitudinal XZ fluence map.
Preview PNG: transverse XY fluence map.
Preview PNG: longitudinal XZ fluence map.
